text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fan Fests are held twice a year. The fall festival,
otherwise known as the Solefall Faire, focuses
more on stalls and cultural events.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of these events is a student-held live
concert. Some performers wind up forming lasting
groups. However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for turning up to see us! That was sooo
much fun!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I never imagined the five of us would perform
together. It's a little sad knowing this is the end.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Right? I've yet to show everyone my ultra hip
dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
We also haven't backflipped, cartwheeled, or
somersaulted in time to the audience's applause.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a second! I thought that was because we
agreed on no acrobatics...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
There's still so many different things we'd like to
do at a concert.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I'm glad you feel that way! Another concert
might be hard to pull off... but a video sounds
doable, right?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
With video editing, I believe we could perform
group stunts.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Bourbon... It sounds to me like you're really into doing acrobatics.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Do you mean we're going to use one of those
fancy videotape recorders? Wow, you cats really
know how to stay ahead of the curve! Let's get
the cameras rolling! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, looks like everyone's into the idea! We've
got more in store for you, so stay tuned!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm taking back our goodbyes for now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: See you all in next year's Solefall Faire, 'kay? ☆

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Next year? So I have to do this again...
